vocab.example: Hiking through the unspoilt wilderness of Patagonia felt like stepping back into a world untouched by human civilization.

vocab.meaning: đô thị trải dài, rộng lớn
vocab.example: At dusk, looking down from the observation deck at the sprawling metropolis of Seoul was a dazzling experience.

vocab.meaning: đầm nước màu xanh ngọc lam lấp lánh
vocab.example: The boat drifted slowly across a shimmering turquoise lagoon that was so clear I could see the seabed perfectly.

vocab.meaning: những núi đá vôi (đặc thù địa chất)
vocab.example: The limestone karsts of Ha Long Bay rising dramatically from the sea create a truly otherworldly landscape.

vocab.meaning: sự giao thoa giữa ánh sáng và bóng tối
vocab.example: The sunset in the Grand Canyon created a breathtaking interplay of light and shadow across the deep ravines.

vocab.meaning: những con ngõ mê cung, chằng chịt
vocab.example: The labyrinthine alleyways of the old Medina in Morocco offered a stunning feast for the eyes at every turn.

vocab.meaning: những dòng thác đổ xuống như bậc thang
vocab.example: The sight of cascading waterfalls in Iceland, surrounded by frozen volcanic rocks, was absolutely spellbinding.

vocab.meaning: những rặng núi phủ tuyết trắng
vocab.example: Waking up to the view of snow-capped ridges reflecting in a calm alpine lake was the highlight of my trip.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp quyến rũ thời thuộc địa
vocab.example: Hoi An’s ancient town possesses a unique colonial charm, especially when illuminated by thousands of silk lanterns.

vocab.meaning: màn trình diễn thiên thể (thường nói về cực quang hoặc sao)
vocab.example: Witnessing the Aurora Borealis was a celestial display of dancing greens and purples that defies description.
